subject: M stuck at "precomputing gradient weights"
body:
Hi guys,

I wanted to test M on some particles but after the initial preparation the 
warp worker closed and M is stuck on precomputing gradient weights and it 
does not look like any process is actually running. Could this be due to a 
weak hardware (I only have a single 1080Ti on this machine) or am I missing 
something else. The setup of all files actually seems alright. Thanks for 
any suggestions and cheers,

Felix
